items.title: Cap stuff from the Pacers trade and draft:
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Cap stuff from the Pacers trade and draft:
-Hard capped at second apron since they traded away cash
-About $2.4 million below the latest luxury tax estimate with 13 players
-About $10 million shy of the first apron (which is technically the most of MLE they can use)

items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
It is interesting that the Minnesota Timberwolves now have the third best offensive AND defensive player in the NBA per Expected EPM

Glossary: 
EPM = Expected Plus/Minus an all-in-one player metric that predicts a player's contribution to the team found at dunksandthrees.com

images.alt:
The three most impactful OFFENSIVE
players
1. Nikola Jokic
2. Kawhi Leonard
3. LAMELO BALL
The three most impactful DEFENSIVE players
1. Victor Wembanyama
2. Ausar Thompson
3. RUDY GOBERT

items.title: The New Orleans Pelicans have exercised their third-year, $2.30 million team option for the 2026-27 season on forward Karlo Matković. He averaged 5.7 points on 60.4% shooting from the field and 42.2% from 3-point range with 3.7 rebounds in 62 games played last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The New Orleans Pelicans have exercised their third-year, $2.30 million team option for the 2026-27 season on forward Karlo Matković. He averaged 5.7 points on 60.4% shooting from the field and 42.2% from 3-point range with 3.7 rebounds in 62 games played last season.
